scenarios.description: children() after emptying element clears cache and short-circuits on zero childNodeSize
scenarios.precondition: element has two <span> children, children() called once, then element.empty()
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns empty list via short-circuit
pseudocode: TEST TC07 children after empty resets to no children
Elements result = el.children();  // should short-circuit B1→B2

scenarios.description: children() rebuilds list when shadowChildrenRef.get() returns null (simulate GC)
scenarios.precondition:
element has one

child, children() called once, then shadowChildrenRef cleared via reflection
scenarios.expectedResult: subsequent children() rebuilds list of one
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children reparses when cache referent lost
Elements result = el.children();                     // rebuilds via loop
